final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original 3x3 character expression grid illustration featuring 赵灵儿 (Zhao Ling'er) from the IP 仙剑奇侠传 (Chinese Paladin), rendered in 3D animation Pixar style.

Style/medium: 3D animation, Pixar-style rendering, soft subsurface skin shading, expressive cartoon proportions, clean white paper background per panel
Composition: 3×3 grid of 9 equal panels, each panel shows the character's upper body peeking through a torn hole in white paper, consistent framing across all 9 cells
Subject: 赵灵儿 — young woman with long flowing light-colored hair (signature white/silver with green ribbon), delicate fairy-like features, large expressive eyes, porcelain skin; each panel shows a distinct expression and outfit as listed below
Scene/backdrop: each panel background is plain white paper with a torn circular hole through which the character peeks; no environmental clutter
Lighting/mood: soft even studio lighting, warm and cheerful overall tone, each panel mood matches its expression
Color palette: each panel uses the outfit color as the dominant accent against white; skin tones warm and consistent across all 9 panels

Panel layout (row by row):
• Top-left — expression: winking | action: adjusting glasses | outfit: green sweater
• Top-center — expression: smirking | action: lowering dark sunglasses | outfit: red leather jacket
• Top-right — expression: thinking | action: finger on chin | outfit: yellow hoodie
• Middle-left — expression: big smile | action: arms resting on edge of hole | outfit: black and white striped shirt
• Middle-center — expression: smiling | action: thumbs up | outfit: orange button-up shirt
• Middle-right — expression: neutral | action: drinking boba tea | outfit: blue sweater
• Bottom-left — expression: happy | action: waving | outfit: purple sweater vest over white shirt
• Bottom-center — expression: laughing with eyes closed | action: arms crossed | outfit: pink cardigan
• Bottom-right — expression: silly | action: poking cheeks | outfit: teal sweater

Constraints: all 9 panels must feature the same character (赵灵儿) with consistent facial structure and hair; torn-paper-hole framing must appear in every panel; grid must be evenly spaced with thin white gutters; character proportions remain consistent across panels
Avoid: mixing different characters, inconsistent face structure between panels, dark or moody lighting, overly complex backgrounds, watermarks, text labels
